assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 10-15: '1. **Checkout the target branch** (TC-9005, NOT main): git checkout TC-9005 / git pull' — explicitly checks out TC-9005, not main, before creating the task branch.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 57-59: 'Create PR targeting the feature branch TC-9005 (NOT main): gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title ...' — uses --base TC-9005 explicitly.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 17-19: '2. **Create the task branch** named after the Jira issue ID: git checkout -b TC-9205' — task branch is TC-9205, distinct from the target branch TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 72-77 under 'Pre-Implementation Verification': references all three files — (1) 'Confirm that entity/src/advisory.rs does NOT reference a status column', (3) 'Read migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs to understand the existing migration pattern', (4) 'Read migration/src/lib.rs to understand how migrations are registered'.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 37: 'With flag: `--trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"`' and lines 41-48 show the full git commit command including --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code".

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 27-35: commit message is 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' (Conventional Commits format with type=feat, scope=migration) and footer contains 'Implements TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 22: 'The target branch is `TC-9005` because this task is part of a feature branch workflow -- the task description specifies `Target Branch: TC-9005` and the linked issue shows "is incorporated by TC-9005".' — explicitly references the Target Branch section from the task description.
